name: Tri Ilham - Electronic Engineering Technology at Politeknik Negeri Semarang
description: An Electronics Engineering student at Politeknik Negeri Semarang with a foundational focus on hardware design, instrumentation, and IoT. Interested in applying control systems and automation to practical technical projects. Experienced in hands-on student projects, including a Water Level System, a Stair-Climbing Robot, and a Mini Radar System. Eager to continue learning and develop these skills further in future engineering projects.
